Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.RestRequest

Packages that use RestRequest
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.microservice.jetty.resources
Predefined Jetty Microservice Resources
org.apache.juneau.microservice.management
Actuator-style management-surface endpoints (microservice-module flavors).
org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources
Predefined Microservice Resources
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.arg
REST Method Argument Beans
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth
Authentication (AuthN) guards, servlet-layer filters, SPIs, and request-time helpers for juneau-rest-server.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.beans
REST Interface Helper Classes
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.converter
REST Response Converters
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.docs
API-docs mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that publish Swagger v2 and OpenAPI 3.1 spec endpoints with Swagger-UI and Redoc HTML mounts.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.guard
REST Guards
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.health
 
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.httppart
REST HTTP Parts
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.management
Actuator-style management-surface endpoints (server-module flavors).
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp
Stateless Model Context Protocol (MCP) endpoint built on juneau-rest-server using the juneau-bean-mcp wire types.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics.micrometer
Micrometer bridge for the juneau-rest-server MetricsRecorder SPI.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.ops
Ops / introspection mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that ship the operational surface (request echo, JVM admin, route index) every long-running Juneau service eventually grows.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet
REST Servlets
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.staticfile
REST Static Files Support
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.tracing
Tracing SPI for juneau-rest-server — per-request span hook backed by a caller-supplied TracerHook bean.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.tracing.otel
OpenTelemetry bridge for the juneau-rest-server TracerHook SPI.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view
Engine-agnostic server-side-rendered view extension point.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.freemarker
Apache FreeMarker view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-freemarker module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.jsp
JSP view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-jsp module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.mustache
Mustache view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-mustache module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.thymeleaf
Thymeleaf view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-thymeleaf module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.widget
HTML Widget API

  • Uses of RestRequest in org.apache.juneau.microservice.jetty.resources

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.microservice.jetty.resources with parameters of type RestRequest
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Ok
    DebugResource.createJettyDump(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    [POST /jetty/dump] - Generates and saves the jetty thread dump file to jetty-thread-dump.log.
    Reader
    DebugResource.getJettyDump(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    [GET /jetty/dump] - Generates and retrieves the jetty thread dump.

    [GET /info] - Application build/version/git metadata from the manifest.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    DirectoryResource.getFile(RestRequest req, String path)
    Returns information about the specified file or directory.
    LogsResource.FileResource
    LogsResource.getFile(RestRequest req, String path)
    Returns information about the specified file or directory.

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server that return RestRequest
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RestRequest
    RestOpContext.createRequest(RestSession session)
    Creates a RestRequest object based on the specified incoming HttpServletRequest object.
    RestRequest
    RestOpSession.getRequest()
    Returns the REST request object for this session.
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.setAuthResult(AuthResult value)
    Sets the resolved resource-level authentication result.
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.setDebug()
    Shortcut for calling setDebug(true).
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.setDebug(Boolean b)
    Sets the "Debug" attribute to the specified boolean.
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.setException(Throwable t)
    Sets the "Exception" attribute to the specified throwable.
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.setNoTrace()
    Shortcut for calling setNoTrace(true).
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.setNoTrace(Boolean b)
    Sets the "NoTrace" attribute to the specified boolean.
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.setParserSessionProperties(Map<String,Object> values)
    Sets multiple parser session properties programmatically.
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.setParserSessionProperty(String name, Object value)
    Sets a parser session property programmatically.
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.setSerializerSessionProperties(Map<String,Object> values)
    Sets multiple serializer session properties programmatically.
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.setSerializerSessionProperty(String name, Object value)
    Sets a serializer session property programmatically.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server that return types with arguments of type RestRequest
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FluentStringAssertion<RestRequest>
    RestRequest.assertCharset()
    Provides the ability to perform fluent-style assertions on the response character encoding.
    FluentRequestContentAssertion<RestRequest>
    RestRequest.assertContent()
    Returns a fluent assertion for the request content.
    FluentRequestFormParamAssertion<RestRequest>
    RestRequest.assertFormParam(String name)
    Returns a fluent assertion for the specified form parameter.
    FluentRequestHeaderAssertion<RestRequest>
    RestRequest.assertHeader(String name)
    Returns a fluent assertion for the specified header.
    FluentRequestQueryParamAssertion<RestRequest>
    RestRequest.assertQueryParam(String name)
    Returns a fluent assertion for the specified query parameter.
    FluentRequestLineAssertion<RestRequest>
    RestRequest.assertRequestLine()
    Returns an assertion on the request line returned by getRequestLine().
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server with parameters of type RestRequest
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RestResponse
    RestOpContext.createResponse(RestSession session, RestRequest req)
    Creates a RestResponse object based on the specified incoming HttpServletResponse object and the request returned by RestOpContext.createRequest(RestSession).

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    OpenApi
    OpenApiMixin.getOpenApi(RestRequest req)
    [GET /openapi] — emit the OpenAPI 3.1 document for this resource.
    void
    OpenApiMixin.getOpenApiJson(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    [GET /openapi.json] — emit the OpenAPI 3.1 document as JSON, ignoring the Accept header.
    void
    OpenApiMixin.getOpenApiYaml(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    [GET /openapi.yaml] — emit the OpenAPI 3.1 document as YAML, ignoring the Accept header.

    RedocMixin.getRedoc(RestRequest req)
    [GET /redoc] — render the Redoc HTML view (or the spec, depending on Accept).
    Swagger
    SwaggerMixin.getSwagger(RestRequest req)
    [GET /api] — emit the Swagger v2 spec for this resource.
    Swagger
    SwaggerUiMixin.getSwaggerUi(RestRequest req)
    [GET /swagger] — render the Swagger-UI HTML view (or the spec, depending on Accept).

    String
    MenuItemWidget.getBeforeShowScript(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    Optional Javascript to execute immediately before a menu item is shown.
    Div
    ContentTypeMenuItem.getContent(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
     
    abstract Object
    MenuItemWidget.getContent(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    The content of the popup.
    String
    QueryMenuItem.getContent(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
     
    Div
    ThemeMenuItem.getContent(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
     
    protected FileFinder
    Widget.getFileFinder(RestRequest req)
    Returns the file finder to use for finding files on the file system.
    String
    MenuItemWidget.getHtml(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
     
    String
    PoweredByApache.getHtml(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    Returns an Apache image tag hyperlinked to "http://apache.org"
    String
    PoweredByJuneau.getHtml(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    Returns an Apache Juneau image tag hyperlinked to "http://juneau.apache.org"
    String
    Widget.getHtml(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    Resolves the HTML content for this widget.
    String
    ContentTypeMenuItem.getLabel(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
     
    abstract String
    MenuItemWidget.getLabel(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    The label for the menu item as it's rendered in the menu bar.
    String
    QueryMenuItem.getLabel(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
     
    String
    ThemeMenuItem.getLabel(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
     
    String
    MenuItemWidget.getScript(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    Returns the Javascript needed for the show and hide actions of the menu item.
    String
    Widget.getScript(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    Resolves any Javascript that should be added to the <head>/<script> element.
    String
    MenuItemWidget.getStyle(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    Defines a "menu-item" class that needs to be used on the outer element of the HTML returned by the MenuItemWidget.getHtml(RestRequest,RestResponse) method.
    String
    QueryMenuItem.getStyle(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    Returns CSS for the tooltips.
    String
    Widget.getStyle(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    Resolves any CSS styles that should be added to the <head>/<style> element.
    protected String
    Widget.loadHtml(RestRequest req, String name)
    Loads the specified HTML file and strips HTML comments from the file.
    protected String
    Widget.loadHtmlWithVars(RestRequest req, RestResponse res, String name)
    Same as Widget.loadHtml(RestRequest,String) but replaces request-time SVL variables.
    protected String
    Widget.loadScript(RestRequest req, String name)
    Loads the specified javascript file and strips any Javascript comments from the file.
    protected String
    Widget.loadScriptWithVars(RestRequest req, RestResponse res, String name)
    Same as Widget.loadScript(RestRequest,String) but replaces request-time SVL variables.
    protected String
    Widget.loadStyle(RestRequest req, String name)
    Loads the specified CSS file and strips CSS comments from the file.
    protected String
    Widget.loadStyleWithVars(RestRequest req, RestResponse res, String name)
    Same as Widget.loadStyle(RestRequest,String) but replaces request-time SVL variables.
